ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lifts" (
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ski lift */,
  "lift_name" TEXT /* Name of the ski lift */,
  "lift_type" TEXT /* Type of the ski lift */,
  "state" TEXT /* Current operational state of the lift */,
  "season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the lift's operating season */,
  "season_end" TEXT /* End date of the lift's operating season */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the lift */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the lift can carry at once */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the ski lift in meters */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Vertical distance the lift covers */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the lift in meters per second */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the lift is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifts_lift_type FOREIGN KEY ("lift_type") REFERENCES lift_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifts_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES lift_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifts_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lift type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Typical capacity for this type of lift */,
  "speed" REAL /* Typical speed for this type of lift */,
  "min_elevation_gain" REAL /* Minimum elevation gain for this type of lift */,
  "max_elevation_gain" REAL /* Maximum elevation gain for this type of lift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the operational state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operational state */,
  "is_operational" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the state is operational */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the season is currently active */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort for which the season is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ski lift */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_hours" REAL /* Hours spent on maintenance */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the maintenance was performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_lift_id FOREIGN KEY ("lift_id") REFERENCES lifts ("lift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resorts" (
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resort */,
  "resort_name" TEXT /* Name of the resort */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resort */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the resort */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the resort */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the resort's website */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the resort opened */,
  "total_lifts" INTEGER /* Total number of lifts at the resort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., lift operator, maintenance engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the staff member's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_operational_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational log entry */,
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ski lift */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the operational state was changed */,
  "previous_state" TEXT /* Previous operational state of the lift */,
  "new_state" TEXT /* New operational state of the lift */,
  "changed_by_staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who made the change */,
  "resort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resort where the operational change was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the operational change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_operational_logs_resort_id FOREIGN KEY ("resort_id") REFERENCES resorts ("resort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_operational_logs_lift_id FOREIGN KEY ("lift_id") REFERENCES lifts ("lift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_operational_logs_changed_by_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
